places.name: Percival Landing Park
places.address: 217 Thurston Ave NW, Olympia, WA 98501, United States

places.name: Olympia Farmer's Market
places.notes: Located near downtown, open Saturdays year-round. Stock up on fresh local produce, artisan goods, and prepared foods for your boat.

places.name: Percival Landing Marina & Waterfront Park
places.notes: Downtown Olympia's main public marina with easy walking access to restaurants, shops, and the State Capitol building.

places.name: Olympia Artesian Well & Capitol Building Grounds
places.notes: Free historic landmark and scenic Capitol campus just steps from the waterfront. Great for a short walk and photos of the impressive dome.

places.name: Budd Bay Café & Local Restaurants
places.notes: Waterfront dining within walking distance of marinas; try local seafood and Pacific Northwest cuisine.

places.name: Priest Point Park
places.notes: Beautiful 168-acre park north of downtown with hiking trails, picnic areas, and native forest just a short drive from the marina.
